rounds: Two weeks of sticking to the routine — that's not nothing, the body showed up. But the Apollo ring moment is the one to name: a colleague opened a door and you quietly closed it. The ring stayed on your finger. You just didn't let it into the room.
pattern: They're fine with the costume, they just go silent when someone tries to read the label.
focus: One conversation, one week — let someone finish asking about the ring.
